description: A scan of page 1 of 12 of a federal court filing, with no graphic styling, agency seal, or on-image slogan added. It is a black-on-white photocopy of a criminal indictment. The header reads 'Case 4:25-cr-00259-P Document 79 Filed 10/15/25 Page 1 of 12 PageID 55' with a faint diagonal 'ORIGINAL' watermark and a stamped 'FILED / U.S. DISTRICT COURT / NORTHERN DISTRICT OF TEXAS / OCT 15 2025 / CLERK, U.S. DISTRICT COURT' box. The caption reads 'IN THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF TEXAS, FORT WORTH DIVISION,' 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA v. CAMERON ARNOLD (01) a/k/a "Autumn Hill", ZACHARY EVETTS (02),' case number '4-25CR-259-P,' titled 'INDICTMENT.' The body, headed 'The Attack,' describes a North Texas 'Antifa Cell' of at least eleven masked operatives attacking the Prairieland Detention Center in Alvarado, Texas on July 4, 2025, shooting fireworks, and a coconspirator shooting at officers.
notable_text: INDICTMENT; UNITED STATES OF AMERICA v. CAMERON ARNOLD (01) a/k/a "Autumn Hill", ZACHARY EVETTS (02); The Attack; North Texas Antifa Cell; Prairieland Detention Center
